rationale: Recipe availability can reuse one product stock pool independently for duplicate same-product ingredients; projected demand hides approximate/incompatible stock behind a definitive shortage; and demand date validation accepts impossible calendar dates. Mapping attribution, recipe-text preservation, serving scaling, exact multi-meal pooling, and non-mutation are otherwise sound.

worker_package.objective: Repair the T009 calculation boundary as one coherent vertical slice: allocate each compatible product stock pool only once across all required ingredients within a recipe; preserve deterministic ingredient-level explanations; expose approximate or incompatible stock as explicit projected-demand uncertainty instead of a definitive shortage; validate real ISO calendar dates; update the planner presentation, API contract, ADR, and focused tests while preserving recipe text, mapping attribution, current concurrent UI integrations, and the non-mutating projection boundary.
verify: pnpm exec prettier --check src/lib/domain/pantry-availability.ts src/lib/services/pantry-availability-service.ts src/app/api/v1/pantry/recipes src/app/api/v1/pantry/demand src/components/meal-plan-pantry-demand.tsx src/components/meal-plan-pantry-demand.module.css tests/unit/pantry-availability.test.ts tests/integration/pantry-availability-service.test.ts docs/openapi.yaml docs/api.md docs/decisions/0031-pantry-availability-and-demand.md
pnpm exec vitest run --project unit tests/unit/pantry-availability.test.ts
stop_if: Repair requires schema or migration changes, grocery/cooking implementation, or files outside allowed_files.
Any solution would count approximate or incompatible stock as exact, silently convert across unit families, or hide uncertainty behind a definitive shortage.
Any solution would reserve, consume, version, or otherwise mutate Pantry batches while calculating availability or demand.
Any change would rewrite recipe ingredient text or revisions, weaken signed-profile mapping attribution, or loosen trusted-origin checks.
Any edit would overwrite concurrent nutrition, reaction, planner, or unrelated user work.
Verification fails twice for a cause outside allowed_files or requires ownership of shared .next.

missing_evidence: Duplicate same-product ingredient allocation, demand uncertainty, and semantic date regressions.
required_board_updates: Activate one repair Worker, then repeat calculation review before grocery/cooking.
